✨ Just you

Every Frame, Perfect

✍️ written for you

Dear Riyal

Some people walk into your life quietly — no grand entrance, no announcement. You were like that. A friend first, just someone I knew. But then 2.5 years happened, and somewhere between all those conversations, I stopped thinking of you as “just a friend.”

There’s something about you that makes the ordinary feel special — the way you smile when you’re caught off guard, the way your eyes light up when you talk about something you love. I’ve noticed all of it, even when I pretended not to.

You walk into a room and suddenly the energy shifts. That laugh, that boldness, that zero-filter confidence — it’s the kind of thing you don’t forget.

Distance kept us apart for a while, but it never kept me from thinking about you. And now that we’re close, I realise — some things are worth the wait. You are worth the wait.

This little website is just me saying, in the only way I know how: you matter. More than you probably realise.

— Always yours 🌹
✨🌹❤️🌹✨

Unfinished Business

Some stories don’t have an ending yet — and honestly, this one is just getting started. 2.5 years in, and the best chapters are still ahead.
